Name: Test - Run NUnit
Description: Runs NUnit tests from a list of assemblies.

Parameters.Name: NUnitExePath
Parameters.Label: NUnit path
Parameters.HelpText: The path to `nunit-console.exe`. If this is not provided it will be assumed that the executable is on the PATH. Example: _C:\Program Files (x86)\NUnit 2.6.3\bin\nunit-console.exe_.

Parameters.Name: NUnitWorkingDirectoryPath
Parameters.Label: Working directory
Parameters.HelpText: The folder that contains the test assemblies. Generally this will be bound to an output variable from a previous step. Example: _#{Octopus.Action[Deploy integration tests].Output.Package.InstallationDirectoryPath}_

Parameters.Name: NUnitTestAssemblies
Parameters.Label: Test assemblies
Parameters.HelpText: A semicolon-separated list of assembly names containing tests. Example: _MyCompany.IntegrationTests.dll; MyCompany.SmokeTests.dll_

Parameters.Name: NUnitAdditionalArgs
Parameters.Label: Additional arguments
Parameters.HelpText: Additional arguments to the NUnit command-line tool. For a full list of supported flags and options see [the NUnit documentation](http://www.nunit.org/index.php?p=consoleCommandLine&r=2.6.3).
